data.keyword: himalayan salt cooking block for grilling

result.keyword: himalayan salt cooking block for grilling

items.markdown:
A Himalayan salt block is `a slab of 100% natural pink salt used for grilling, searing, and chilling food` . It seasons food naturally while providing even heat distribution and a high-heat surface for a perfect sear.[[1]](https://www.hickoryfarms.com/blog/food-how-to/salt-block-101.html#:~:text=%28But%20be%20sure%20to%20check,it's%20at%20your%20desired%20temperature.)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:17355820567883728560,catalogid:18383953190279965674&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://sobaansalts.com/how-to-use-himalayan-salt-block/#:~:text=Himalayan%20Salt%20Slabs-,2.,grilling%2C%20chilling%2C%20and%20serving.)[[4]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:10730986286655688251&ibp=oshop)[[5]](https://www.amazon.com/DOBADN-Himalayan-Block-Cooking-Grilling/dp/B09SYX6462#:~:text=diet%20more%20healthier.-,Product%20Description,hours%20before%20using%20it%20again.)

Popular Salt Block Products

- **[Pink Salt Wall Himalayan Salt Cooking Block Plate (12 x 8 x 2 in)](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:1048000444906230529,headlineOfferDocid:17355820567883728560,catalogid:18383953190279965674,productDocid:17355820567883728560,rds:PC_4722004573420590768%7CPROD_PC_4722004573420590768&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwiOnebb-6OTAxX0_rsIHdwXJYgQxa4PegQIBBAC)** 
	- According to **Walmart** , this large, thick block is ideal for grilling and features natural color variations.
- **[Napoleon Himalayan Salt Block with PRO Grill Topper](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,mid:576462673127613123,imageDocid:4679724333159133732,gpcid:9800393443533233313,headlineOfferDocid:10730168964166726262,catalogid:8916801886589769099,productDocid:8238485826668316347,rds:PC_9800393443533233313%7CPROD_PC_9800393443533233313&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwiOnebb-6OTAxX0_rsIHdwXJYgQxa4PegQIBBAG)** 
	- Reviewers on **Home Depot** highlight the stainless steel holder which makes it easy to transport from the grill to the table.
- **[Himalayan Salt Cooking Plate (8 x 8 x 1 in)](https://www.etsy.com/listing/4308075429/himalayan-salt-cooking-plate-mineral?gpla=1&gao=1&)** 
	- This more compact option from **Etsy** is described as a mineral-rich slab suitable for both indoor and outdoor heavy-duty use.
- **[[UMAID Himalayan Salt Block Cooking Plate with Stainless Steel Holder](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,mid:576462374451317967,imageDocid:17145520532169466260,gpcid:2458658892530168123,headlineOfferDocid:6276392793456311100,catalogid:7478302895481973316,productDocid:370011426065598277&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwiOnebb-6OTAxX0_rsIHdwXJYgQxa4PegQIBBAO) ](https://www.tiktok.com/shop/pdp/himalayan-salt-block-by-umaid-for-grilling-cooking-with-stainless-steel-tray/1729452088832069809)** 
	- Featured on **TikTok Shop** , this set includes a rust-resistant holder and a recipe book for beginners.[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:17355820567883728560,catalogid:18383953190279965674&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:8238485826668316347,catalogid:8916801886589769099,gpcid:9800393443533233313,mid:576462673127613123&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:10730986286655688251&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:370011426065598277,catalogid:7478302895481973316,gpcid:2458658892530168123,mid:576462374451317967&ibp=oshop)[[5]](https://salam-dhr.org/view/Block-Plate-12x8x2-Inches-With-Steel-Tray-For-Grilling/1281167#:~:text=This%20Himalayan%20salt%20block%20is%20a%20beautiful,or%20even%20bake%20flatbreads%20right%20on%20it.)

How to Use for Grilling

To prevent the block from cracking or "exploding" from trapped moisture, it must be heated gradually:[[1]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cMcHMc1T6_U&t=4)[[2]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GXnLEUlXdeU&t=4)[[3]](https://www.ebay.com/itm/295528131962)

1. **Start Slow** : Place the completely dry block on a cold grill.
2. **Low Heat** : Heat on low for 15 minutes.
3. **Medium Heat** : Increase to medium for another 15 minutes.
4. **High Heat** : Finally, bring it to high heat (400°F–500°F) for another 15 minutes until ready.
5. **Test Readiness** : Sprinkle a few drops of water on the surface; if they sizzle and evaporate instantly, it is ready.[[1]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cMcHMc1T6_U&t=4)[[2]](https://himalayansaltbrick.com/grill-sear-serve-himalayan-salt-blocks/#:~:text=Heat%20gradually%20to%20avoid%20cracking,does%20not%20affect%20its%20performance.)[[3]](https://www.grillingcompanion.com/grilling-himalayan-salt-plate/#:~:text=They%20also%20can%20be%20cooled,and%20keep%20the%20lid%20on.)[[4]](https://themeadow.com/pages/guide-to-himalayan-salt-blocks#:~:text=For%20a%20Grill:%20Place%20your,in%20the%20gas%20range%20instructions.)[[5]](https://selectsalt.com/salt/cooking-with-a-himalayan-salt-block/#:~:text=Heating%20Up%20the%20Salt%20BlockYour%20Himalayan%20salt%20block%20should,salt%20block%20using%20oven%20mits.)[[6]](https://justcook.butcherbox.com/how-to-salt-block-summer/#:~:text=Cooking%20with%20the%20Salt%20Block,Thin%20cuts%20are%20best.)

Maintenance and Care

- **Cleaning** : Allow the block to cool completely (this can take hours) before cleaning. Use a metal spatula to scrape off residue and wipe with a damp cloth.
- **Avoid Soap** : Never use soap or detergents, as the porous salt will absorb them, affecting the flavor of your next meal.
- **No Soaking** : Do not submerge the block in water or put it in the dishwasher, as it will dissolve.
- **Storage** : Store in a cool, dry place away from humidity; wrapping it in a towel or placing it in a sealed bag is recommended.[[1]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jLhnmHLm_mk&t=4)[[2]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cMcHMc1T6_U&t=4)[[3]](https://www.gaucho-grills.com/blog/2016/2/4/tips-for-grilling-with-a-pink-himalayan-salt-block#:~:text=If%20you%20try%20cooking%20before,if%20left%20on%20the%20slab.)[[4]](https://www.amazon.com/DOBADN-Himalayan-Block-Cooking-Grilling/dp/B09SYX6462#:~:text=diet%20more%20healthier.-,Product%20Description,hours%20before%20using%20it%20again.)[[5]](https://selectsalt.com/salt/cooking-with-a-himalayan-salt-block/#:~:text=Heating%20Up%20the%20Salt%20BlockYour%20Himalayan%20salt%20block%20should,salt%20block%20using%20oven%20mits.)[[6]](https://himalayantradingco.com/zh-cn/blogs/blog/how-to-use-himalayan-salt-blocks-for-cooking-serving#:~:text=Cleaning%20and%20maintenance:,cooking%20and%20another%20for%20serving.)[[7]](https://www.gaucho-grills.com/blog/2017/4/11/tips-for-cleaning-your-pink-himalayan-salt-block#:~:text=So%2C%20what's%20the%20solution%20if,we%20think%20are%20worth%20remembering:)[[8]](https://themeadow.com/pages/guide-to-himalayan-salt-blocks#:~:text=For%20a%20Grill:%20Place%20your,in%20the%20gas%20range%20instructions.)[[9]](https://www.caravelgourmet.com/pages/himalayan-salt-block-cooking-care-and-recipes)

Key Benefits

- **Natural Seasoning** : Imparts a mild, mineral-rich saltiness to meats, seafood, and vegetables.
- **Antimicrobial Surface** : Salt is naturally resistant to bacteria, making it a safe cooking surface.
- **Temperature Retention** : Holds both extreme heat (up to 500°F) and extreme cold, making it a versatile serving platter for sushi or cold appetizers.[[1]](https://www.gaucho-grills.com/blog/2017/4/11/tips-for-cleaning-your-pink-himalayan-salt-block#:~:text=So%2C%20what's%20the%20solution%20if,we%20think%20are%20worth%20remembering:)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:8238485826668316347,catalogid:8916801886589769099,gpcid:9800393443533233313,mid:576462673127613123&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:16062999897458273200,catalogid:12390166153522278997,gpcid:5611578437706137761&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://www.hickoryfarms.com/blog/food-how-to/salt-block-101.html#:~:text=%28But%20be%20sure%20to%20check,it's%20at%20your%20desired%20temperature.)[[5]](https://sobaansalts.com/how-to-use-himalayan-salt-block/#:~:text=Himalayan%20Salt%20Slabs-,2.,grilling%2C%20chilling%2C%20and%20serving.)

Would you like a specific **recipe for steak or seafood** to try on your new salt block?

items.title: Maintenance and Care
items.text: Cleaning : Allow the block to cool completely (this can take hours) before cleaning. Use a metal spatula to scrape off residue and wipe with a damp cloth. Avoid Soap : Never use soap or detergents, as the porous salt will absorb them, affecting the flavor of your next meal. No Soaking : Do not submerge the block in water or put it in the dishwasher, as it will dissolve. Storage : Store in a cool, dry place away from humidity; wrapping it in a towel or placing it in a sealed bag is recommended.

- **Cleaning** : Allow the block to cool completely (this can take hours) before cleaning. Use a metal spatula to scrape off residue and wipe with a damp cloth.
- **Avoid Soap** : Never use soap or detergents, as the porous salt will absorb them, affecting the flavor of your next meal.
- **No Soaking** : Do not submerge the block in water or put it in the dishwasher, as it will dissolve.
- **Storage** : Store in a cool, dry place away from humidity; wrapping it in a towel or placing it in a sealed bag is recommended.[[1]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jLhnmHLm_mk&t=4)[[2]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cMcHMc1T6_U&t=4)[[3]](https://www.gaucho-grills.com/blog/2016/2/4/tips-for-grilling-with-a-pink-himalayan-salt-block#:~:text=If%20you%20try%20cooking%20before,if%20left%20on%20the%20slab.)[[4]](https://www.amazon.com/DOBADN-Himalayan-Block-Cooking-Grilling/dp/B09SYX6462#:~:text=diet%20more%20healthier.-,Product%20Description,hours%20before%20using%20it%20again.)[[5]](https://selectsalt.com/salt/cooking-with-a-himalayan-salt-block/#:~:text=Heating%20Up%20the%20Salt%20BlockYour%20Himalayan%20salt%20block%20should,salt%20block%20using%20oven%20mits.)[[6]](https://himalayantradingco.com/zh-cn/blogs/blog/how-to-use-himalayan-salt-blocks-for-cooking-serving#:~:text=Cleaning%20and%20maintenance:,cooking%20and%20another%20for%20serving.)[[7]](https://www.gaucho-grills.com/blog/2017/4/11/tips-for-cleaning-your-pink-himalayan-salt-block#:~:text=So%2C%20what's%20the%20solution%20if,we%20think%20are%20worth%20remembering:)[[8]](https://themeadow.com/pages/guide-to-himalayan-salt-blocks#:~:text=For%20a%20Grill:%20Place%20your,in%20the%20gas%20range%20instructions.)[[9]](https://www.caravelgourmet.com/pages/himalayan-salt-block-cooking-care-and-recipes)

items.title: Key Benefits
items.text: Natural Seasoning : Imparts a mild, mineral-rich saltiness to meats, seafood, and vegetables. Antimicrobial Surface : Salt is naturally resistant to bacteria, making it a safe cooking surface. Temperature Retention : Holds both extreme heat (up to 500°F) and extreme cold, making it a versatile serving platter for sushi or cold appetizers.
items.markdown:
- **Natural Seasoning** : Imparts a mild, mineral-rich saltiness to meats, seafood, and vegetables.
- **Antimicrobial Surface** : Salt is naturally resistant to bacteria, making it a safe cooking surface.
- **Temperature Retention** : Holds both extreme heat (up to 500°F) and extreme cold, making it a versatile serving platter for sushi or cold appetizers.[[1]](https://www.gaucho-grills.com/blog/2017/4/11/tips-for-cleaning-your-pink-himalayan-salt-block#:~:text=So%2C%20what's%20the%20solution%20if,we%20think%20are%20worth%20remembering:)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:8238485826668316347,catalogid:8916801886589769099,gpcid:9800393443533233313,mid:576462673127613123&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:16062999897458273200,catalogid:12390166153522278997,gpcid:5611578437706137761&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://www.hickoryfarms.com/blog/food-how-to/salt-block-101.html#:~:text=%28But%20be%20sure%20to%20check,it's%20at%20your%20desired%20temperature.)[[5]](https://sobaansalts.com/how-to-use-himalayan-salt-block/#:~:text=Himalayan%20Salt%20Slabs-,2.,grilling%2C%20chilling%2C%20and%20serving.)
